title: Terrain PBR Fix
description: Fixes some terrain LabPBR problems in shaderpacks.
body:
Fixes pbr problems caused by variated terrain resource pack and mods.

![As you see in the picture the right sides pbr is broken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7de5253838cdab7667010ec632c010d5e33c7af0_0.webp)

Fixed blocks:
- Crimson Nylium
- Dirt Path
- Grass Block
- Mycelium
- Podzol
- Warped Nylium
